payload.label: faucet
payload.long_description: Chrome/metallic curved cylindrical faucet spout, shown in a tight vertical edge-crop and partially cut off; reflective metal surface with visible highlights and a small mounting/neck area, appearing close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).
